name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: The Logitech MX Master 3S is an advanced wireless mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed scrolling, ergonomic design, and customizable buttons for power users.

name: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro
description: The Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro is a premium mechanical gaming keyboard with Razer Yellow switches, RGB backlighting, and fully programmable macro keys.

name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD
description: The Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD delivers exceptional read and write speeds for demanding workloads, gaming, and content creation with industry-leading reliability.

name: ASUS ROG Strix G16 Gaming Laptop
description: The ASUS ROG Strix G16 is a powerhouse gaming laptop featuring an Intel Core i9 processor, NVIDIA RTX 4070 GPU, 165Hz display, and advanced thermal cooling system.

name: Corsair K70 RGB MK.2
description: The Corsair K70 RGB MK.2 is a full-sized mechanical gaming keyboard with Cherry MX switches, dynamic RGB per-key lighting, and an aircraft-grade aluminum frame.

name: Dell XPS 15 Laptop
description: The Dell XPS 15 combines stunning 4K OLED display technology with Intel Core i7 performance and long-lasting battery life in a premium slim and lightweight chassis.

name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless
description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless is a premium gaming headset with active noise cancellation, dual-wireless connectivity, hot-swappable batteries, and Hi-Fi audio drivers.

name: WD My Passport 5TB Portable HDD
description: The WD My Passport 5TB portable hard drive offers ample storage in a compact form factor with USB-C connectivity, password protection, and automatic backup software.

name: Intel Core i9-14900K Desktop Processor
description: The Intel Core i9-14900K is a flagship desktop processor with 24 cores, 32 threads, and a max turbo frequency of 6.0GHz, built for extreme gaming and professional workloads.

name: Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps
description: Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps gives you access to the full suite of creative applications including Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and over 20 more industry-standard tools.

name: Elgato Stream Deck MK.2
description: The Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 features 15 customizable LCD keys to control your stream, switch scenes, launch apps, and automate complex tasks with one touch.

name: Alienware Aurora R15 Gaming Desktop
description: The Alienware Aurora R15 is a high-performance gaming desktop with an Intel Core i9 processor, NVIDIA RTX 4090 graphics, and tool-less chassis for easy upgrades.

name: HP Envy 16 Laptop
description: The HP Envy 16 is a versatile creator laptop with an Intel Core i7 processor, NVIDIA RTX 4060 GPU, and a stunning 16-inch 2.5K IPS display with wide color coverage.

name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
description: The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 is an ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse weighing under 60g, featuring the HERO 2 sensor for precision esports-level tracking.

name: Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5 32GB
description: Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5 32GB 6000MHz memory kit delivers blazing-fast performance with dynamic RGB lighting and Intel XMP 3.0 and AMD EXPO support.

name: Microsoft Windows 11 Pro
description: Microsoft Windows 11 Pro offers enhanced security features, DirectStorage for gaming, virtual desktops, and a redesigned Start menu experience for professionals.

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Super
description: The NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Super GPU delivers exceptional 4K gaming performance with DLSS 3.5, ray tracing, and AI-accelerated graphics for the ultimate gaming experience.

name: Razer Viper V3 Pro
description: The Razer Viper V3 Pro is an ultra-lightweight wireless esports mouse with Focus Pro 35K sensor, 90-hour battery life, and 8K polling rate for tournament-ready precision.

name: Seagate Barracuda 8TB HDD
description: The Seagate Barracuda 8TB internal hard drive provides massive storage capacity at an affordable price, with MultiTier Caching Technology for improved read and write performance.

name: Apple MacBook Pro 14-inch M4
description: The Apple MacBook Pro 14-inch with M4 chip delivers industry-leading performance for professionals with a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display and all-day battery life.

name: ASUS ProArt B650-Creator Motherboard
description: The ASUS ProArt B650-Creator is a feature-rich AMD motherboard for content creators with Thunderbolt 4, 2.5G LAN, PCIe 5.0 support, and robust power delivery.

name: Corsair iCUE H150i Elite Capellix XT
description: The Corsair iCUE H150i Elite Capellix XT is a 360mm all-in-one liquid CPU cooler with 33 ultra-bright Capellix LEDs and three LL120 RGB fans for outstanding cooling performance.

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
description: The Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12 is an ultra-light business laptop with Intel Core Ultra 7, military-grade durability, outstanding keyboard, and 2K IPS display.

name: Razer Kraken V3 HyperSense
description: The Razer Kraken V3 HyperSense is a USB gaming headset with haptic technology that delivers bass vibrations, THX Spatial Audio, and TriForce Titanium 50mm drivers.

name: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 16GB
description: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 16GB 5200MHz RAM offers high-speed performance with low latency for gaming and productivity, compatible with Intel and AMD platforms.

name: MSI Titan GT77 HX Gaming Laptop
description: The MSI Titan GT77 HX is the ultimate gaming laptop powered by Intel Core i9 HX, NVIDIA RTX 4090, a 4K 144Hz mini-LED display, and Cherry MX mechanical keyboard.

name: Elgato 4K60 Pro MK.2 Capture Card
description: The Elgato 4K60 Pro MK.2 is an internal PCIe capture card that records console gameplay in stunning 4K60 HDR10, with VRR support and instant gameview for zero-lag monitoring.

name: SanDisk Extreme Pro 2TB Portable SSD
description: The SanDisk Extreme Pro 2TB portable SSD delivers read speeds up to 2000MB/s with USB 3.2 Gen 2x2, rugged IP65 resistance, and password protection for secure on-the-go storage.

name: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X Processor
description: The AMD Ryzen 9 7950X features 16 cores and 32 threads with a boost clock of 5.7GHz, built on TSMC 5nm architecture for exceptional multi-threaded workstation and desktop performance.

name: Logitech G915 TKL Wireless Keyboard
description: The Logitech G915 TKL is a tenkeyless wireless gaming keyboard with ultra-thin low-profile GL mechanical switches, RGB lighting, and dual wireless connectivity.

name: Acer Predator Helios 18 Laptop
description: The Acer Predator Helios 18 is a top-tier gaming laptop with Intel Core i9 HX, NVIDIA RTX 4090, QHD 250Hz IPS display, and Killer Wi-Fi 6E for competitive gaming.

name: Corsair RM1000x SHIFT Modular PSU
description: The Corsair RM1000x SHIFT is an 80 PLUS Gold certified 1000W fully modular power supply with side-mounted connectors, ultra-quiet Zero RPM fan mode, and a 10-year warranty.

name: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed
description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed is a wireless gaming mouse featuring the iconic ergonomic design with Focus X 26K optical sensor and 300-hour battery life.

name: Crucial P5 Plus 1TB NVMe SSD
description: The Crucial P5 Plus 1TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD delivers sequential read speeds up to 6600MB/s, with dynamic write acceleration and enhanced reliability for demanding workloads.

name: Microsoft Office 365 Personal
description: Microsoft Office 365 Personal includes Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and 1TB of OneDrive cloud storage, with continuous updates for one user across all devices.

name: NZXT H9 Elite Mid-Tower Case
description: The NZXT H9 Elite is a stunning mid-tower PC case with panoramic tempered glass panels, full-view dual-chamber layout, and included 120mm RGB fans for exceptional airflow.

name: Logitech G502 X Plus Wireless
description: The Logitech G502 X Plus is a wireless gaming mouse with LIGHTFORCE hybrid optical-mechanical switches, HERO 25K sensor, and LIGHTSYNC RGB for an enhanced gaming experience.

name: Acer Swift 5 Laptop
description: The Acer Swift 5 is an ultra-thin and lightweight laptop weighing under 1kg, featuring Intel Core Ultra 7, OLED touchscreen display, and all-day battery life for on-the-go productivity.

name: HyperX Cloud III Wireless Headset
description: The HyperX Cloud III Wireless gaming headset delivers immersive audio with 53mm angled drivers, DTS Headphone:X spatial audio, and up to 120-hour battery life.

name: Gigabyte RTX 4070 Ti Super Gaming OC
description: The Gigabyte RTX 4070 Ti Super Gaming OC features the WINDFORCE cooling system, factory overclocked Ada Lovelace GPU, and RGB Fusion lighting for powerful 1440p and 4K gaming.

name: Elgato Wave XLR Audio Interface
description: The Elgato Wave XLR is a premium audio interface for streamers and podcasters, with 75dB of gain, real-time monitoring, and Wave Link integration for professional-grade broadcasting.

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Gaming 3 Laptop
description: The Lenovo IdeaPad Gaming 3 is an entry-level gaming laptop powered by AMD Ryzen 5 and NVIDIA RTX 3050, offering a 144Hz FHD display and solid gaming performance at a budget price.

name: ASUS TUF Gaming F15 Laptop
description: The ASUS TUF Gaming F15 is a military-grade durable gaming laptop with Intel Core i7, NVIDIA RTX 4060, 144Hz FHD display, and MIL-STD-810H certification for rugged reliability.

name: Corsair Sabre RGB Pro Champion

name: G.Skill Trident Z5 Neo RGB 64GB DDR5
description: G.Skill Trident Z5 Neo RGB 64GB DDR5-6000 is optimized for AMD Ryzen 7000 systems with EXPO overclocking, CL30 latency, and dazzling addressable RGB lighting.

name: Norton 360 Antivirus Plus
description: Norton 360 Antivirus Plus provides comprehensive device security with real-time threat protection, a secure VPN, password manager, and dark web monitoring for complete peace of mind.

name: Thermaltake Toughpower GF3 1200W
description: The Thermaltake Toughpower GF3 1200W is an ATX 3.0 compliant 80 PLUS Gold certified fully modular power supply with a native PCIe 5.0 16-pin connector and 16cm silent fan.

name: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro Keyboard
description: The Razer Huntsman V3 Pro features second-generation analog optical switches with 8000Hz polling rate, per-key RGB lighting, and premium doubleshot PBT keycaps for pro gaming.

name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 6
description: Microsoft Surface Laptop 6 features Intel Core Ultra 7, a vibrant 13.5-inch PixelSense touchscreen, all-day battery, and Copilot AI integration for a premium Windows experience.

name: be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5 CPU Cooler
description: The be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5 is a dual-tower air CPU cooler with 250W TDP, two Silent Wings 4 fans, brushed aluminum top cover, and virtually silent operation at full load.

name: Logitech G PRO X 60 Keyboard

name: ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED
description: The ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED features AMD Ryzen 7, a gorgeous 2.8K 90Hz OLED display, Intel Arc graphics, and a featherlight design for creative professionals on the move.

name: Sony Inzone H9 Wireless Headset
description: The Sony Inzone H9 wireless gaming headset features active noise cancellation, 360 Spatial Sound for gaming, dual wireless connectivity, and 32-hour battery life for immersive play.

name: Sabrent Rocket 4 Plus 4TB NVMe SSD
description: The Sabrent Rocket 4 Plus 4TB is a high-performance PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD with speeds up to 7100MB/s read, ideal for content creators and power users needing massive fast storage.

name: Razer Basilisk V3 Pro Wireless
description: The Razer Basilisk V3 Pro is a wireless gaming mouse with Razer HyperScroll Tilt Wheel, 11 programmable buttons, Focus Pro 30K sensor, and Chroma RGB underglow lighting.

name: MSI MPG B650 Carbon WiFi Motherboard
description: The MSI MPG B650 Carbon WiFi is a high-end AMD AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 6E, 2.5G LAN, USB 3.2 Gen 2x2, and Mystic Light RGB for powerful Ryzen 7000 builds.

name: HP Omen 45L Gaming Desktop
description: The HP Omen 45L Gaming Desktop comes with AMD Ryzen 9, NVIDIA RTX 4080, 64GB DDR5 RAM, 2TB SSD, and a liquid-cooled Cryo Chamber design for extreme thermal performance.

name: Elgato Key Light Air

name: Corsair Void RGB Elite Wireless Headset

name: LG gram 17 Laptop
description: The LG gram 17 is an incredibly lightweight 17-inch laptop weighing only 1.35kg, powered by Intel Core Ultra 7, with a stunning WQXGA IPS display and military-grade durability.

name: ASUS ROG Claymore II Keyboard

name: Seagate FireCuda 530 2TB SSD
description: The Seagate FireCuda 530 2TB is a PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD with read speeds up to 7300MB/s, featuring an E18 controller, 3D TLC NAND, and 1275TBW endurance for demanding use.

name: Steam Deck OLED 1TB
description: The Steam Deck OLED 1TB is a handheld gaming PC featuring a brilliant 7.4-inch HDR OLED display, extended battery life, Wi-Fi 6E, and access to your entire Steam library.

name: NZXT Kraken 360 RGB AIO Cooler
description: The NZXT Kraken 360 RGB is a 360mm all-in-one liquid CPU cooler with an LCD display, three 120mm RGB fans, and redesigned pump head for superior cooling performance.

name: SteelSeries Rival 5 Gaming Mouse
description: The SteelSeries Rival 5 gaming mouse features a TrueMove Air optical sensor, 9 programmable buttons, golden micro IP54 switches, and 9-zone PrismSync RGB lighting.

name: Bitdefender Total Security 2025
description: Bitdefender Total Security 2025 provides multi-layer ransomware protection, advanced threat defense, anti-phishing, VPN, and parental controls across Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android.

name: Corsair MM700 RGB Extended Mouse Pad
description: The Corsair MM700 RGB Extended is a large gaming mouse pad with dynamic 360-degree iCUE RGB edge lighting, USB pass-through, and a premium micro-textured cloth surface.

name: MSI Stealth 16 AI Studio Laptop
description: The MSI Stealth 16 AI Studio is a creator and gaming powerhouse featuring Intel Core Ultra 9, NVIDIA RTX 4080, a 4K OLED 120Hz display, and an ultra-slim premium chassis.

name: Fnatic miniSTREAK Silent Keyboard
description: The Fnatic miniSTREAK Silent is a compact TKL gaming keyboard with Cherry MX Silent Red switches, individually lit RGB keys, and a durable aluminum top plate for esports.

name: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe SSD
description: The WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe Gen4 SSD features Predictive Loading technology with read speeds up to 7300MB/s, heatsink option, and official PlayStation 5 compatibility.

name: Logitech G733 Lightspeed Wireless Headset
description: The Logitech G733 Lightspeed is a wireless gaming headset with LIGHTSPEED wireless, LIGHTSYNC RGB, Blue VO!CE microphone technology, and 29-hour battery life.

name: Acer Nitro V 15 Gaming Laptop
description: The Acer Nitro V 15 is a budget-friendly gaming laptop with Intel Core i5 H, NVIDIA RTX 4060, a 144Hz FHD IPS display, and dual-fan Acer CoolBoost thermal system.

name: Razer Seiren V3 Mini Microphone
description: The Razer Seiren V3 Mini is a compact USB condenser microphone with a cardioid pickup pattern, tap-to-mute with LED indicator, and Chroma RGB lighting for streaming setups.

name: Intel Arc A770 16GB Graphics Card
description: The Intel Arc A770 16GB is a discrete desktop GPU with XeSS AI upscaling, DirectX 12 Ultimate support, AV1 hardware encode and decode, and 16GB of GDDR6 video memory.

name: Corsair K65 Plus Wireless 75% Keyboard
description: The Corsair K65 Plus Wireless is a 75% layout gaming keyboard with tri-mode wireless, hot-swappable switches, premium south-facing RGB, and a machined aluminum top case.

name: Lenovo Legion 7i Gen 9 Laptop
description: The Lenovo Legion 7i Gen 9 is a premium gaming laptop with Intel Core i9 HX, NVIDIA RTX 4080, a QHD+ 240Hz mini-LED display, and Legion ColdFront 5.0 thermal solution.

name: ASUS ROG Phone 8 Pro
description: The ASUS ROG Phone 8 Pro is an ultimate gaming smartphone with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, a 6.78-inch 165Hz AMOLED display, 65W fast charging, and AeroActive Cooler compatibility.

name: Glorious Model O 2 Wireless Mouse
description: The Glorious Model O 2 Wireless is an ultra-lightweight honeycomb gaming mouse with a 26K DPI sensor, 190-hour battery, and symmetric ambidextrous design for all grip styles.

name: Crucial T705 2TB PCIe Gen5 SSD
description: The Crucial T705 is the fastest PCIe Gen5 NVMe M.2 SSD with sequential reads up to 14,500MB/s and writes up to 12,700MB/s, ideal for next-gen workstations and high-end PCs.

name: NZXT Function 2 TKL Keyboard
description: The NZXT Function 2 TKL is a gaming keyboard with hot-swappable optical switches, per-key RGB lighting, USB-C detachable cable, and multi-platform compatibility.

name: AVG Internet Security 2025
description: AVG Internet Security 2025 delivers enhanced protection against viruses, ransomware, phishing, and spyware with a lightweight engine that keeps your PC running smoothly.

name: Razer Naga V2 HyperSpeed Wireless
description: The Razer Naga V2 HyperSpeed is a wireless MMO gaming mouse with 19 plus 1 programmable buttons, HyperSpeed wireless technology, Focus Pro 30K sensor, and 150-hour battery life.

name: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
description: The AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX is AMD's flagship RDNA 3 GPU with 24GB GDDR6 memory, AV1 encode support, and exceptional 4K gaming and content creation performance.

name: Samsung T9 4TB Portable SSD
description: The Samsung T9 4TB is a high-speed portable SSD with USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 delivering read and write speeds up to 2000MB/s, rugged design, and NVMe-level performance in your pocket.

name: Blue Yeti USB Microphone
description: The Blue Yeti USB microphone offers four selectable pickup patterns, studio-quality sound for podcasting and streaming, Blue VO!CE software integration, and plug-and-play simplicity.

name: HP Spectre x360 14 2-in-1 Laptop
description: The HP Spectre x360 14 is a premium 2-in-1 convertible laptop with Intel Core Ultra 7, a 2.8K OLED touchscreen, Intel Arc GPU, and a stunning tile-edge design.

name: Cooler Master MasterCase H500M
description: The Cooler Master MasterCase H500M is a premium mid-tower ATX case with dual 200mm ARGB fans, tempered glass side and front panels, and modular design for flexible PC builds.

name: HyperX Alloy Origins 65 Keyboard
description: The HyperX Alloy Origins 65 is a compact gaming keyboard with HyperX Red linear switches, per-key RGB lighting, a solid aluminum body, and three-layer software-free customization.

name: Zotac Gaming GeForce RTX 4060 Ti
description: The Zotac Gaming RTX 4060 Ti features NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU, DLSS 3, 8GB GDDR6, and the IceStorm 2.0 cooling system for smooth 1080p and 1440p gaming performance.

name: Razer Wolverine V3 Pro Controller
description: The Razer Wolverine V3 Pro is a wireless pro gaming controller for PC and Xbox with HyperSpeed wireless, micro-switches, 6 remappable buttons, and hair-trigger locks.

name: Samsung 870 QVO 8TB SATA SSD
description: The Samsung 870 QVO 8TB is a high-capacity 2.5-inch SATA SSD with Intelligent TurboWrite technology, 560MB/s sequential read speed, and a 3-year warranty for bulk storage.

name: ASUS ROG Delta S Animate Headset
description: The ASUS ROG Delta S Animate is a USB-C gaming headset with a customizable AniMe Matrix LED display on the earcup, Hi-Res ESS DAC, and AI noise-canceling microphone.

name: Acer ConceptD 7 Pro Creator Laptop
description: The Acer ConceptD 7 Pro is a professional creator laptop with Intel Core i7, NVIDIA RTX A5000, factory-calibrated Delta-E less than 2 4K IPS display, and Pantone Validated color accuracy.

name: Logitech G Hub Software
description: Logitech G Hub is a free software platform to customize Logitech G gaming gear, program macros, sync Lightsync RGB, and manage device profiles all in one place.

name: Alienware m18 R2 Gaming Laptop
description: The Alienware m18 R2 is a desktop-replacement gaming laptop with Intel Core i9 HX, NVIDIA RTX 4090, an 18-inch QHD+ 240Hz display, and Cherry MX mechanical keyboard.

name: EpocCam Pro Webcam App
description: EpocCam Pro transforms your iPhone or Android into a high-quality wireless webcam for OBS, Zoom, and Teams, with 4K support, background removal, and low-latency connectivity.

name: Corsair Scimitar Elite Wireless Mouse
description: The Corsair Scimitar Elite Wireless is an MMO gaming mouse with 16 fully programmable side buttons, SLIPSTREAM wireless technology, 26K DPI sensor, and 100-hour battery life.

name: Fractal Design Torrent Compact Case
description: The Fractal Design Torrent Compact is a high-airflow mid-tower PC case with three included 140mm fans, open-vent front panel, and flexible E-ATX support in a compact footprint.

name: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless
description: The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless features the world's first adjustable actuation OmniPoint 2.0 magnetic switches, Quantum 2.0 wireless, and 100-hour battery life.

name: ASUS VivoBook 15 Laptop
description: The ASUS VivoBook 15 is an affordable everyday laptop with AMD Ryzen 5 7520U, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD, FHD display, and a fingerprint reader for secure and convenient daily use.
